hero.title: Astrocartography Calculator - Discover Your Ideal Location
hero.description: Astrocartography Calculator maps your birth chart onto the world, revealing where planetary lines amplify your career, relationships, and personal growth. Using professional-grade calculations with Swiss Ephemeris accurate to 1 mile, we analyze locations worldwide to show where Sun, Venus, Jupiter, and other planetary energies are strongest. Digital nomads, relocators, and astrology enthusiasts trust our free tool for data-driven location insights—no sign-up, no limits.

introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: What Is Astrocartography — And How Does It Work?
introduce.label: Astrocartography Explained
introduce.description: Astrocartography is a branch of locational astrology that projects your natal birth chart onto the world globe, revealing how each planet's energy shifts depending on where on Earth you live or travel. Developed by American astrologer Jim Lewis in the 1970s, it has become the most widely used system for understanding how geography shapes your life — from career and creativity to love and personal growth.

items.title: How Astrocartography Lines Are Calculated
items.description: At your exact birth moment, each planet occupied a specific angular position in the sky. Astrocartography calculates four lines per planet — where that planet was rising on the horizon (Ascendant/ASC line), setting below the horizon (Descendant/DSC line), directly overhead at midheaven (MC line), or at its lowest point underfoot (IC line). These four lines per planet create up to 40 personal energy lines crossing the globe. When you live or travel near any of these lines, that planet's influence intensifies — shaping your relationships, career visibility, creative output, and sense of belonging in that specific location.

image.alt: How astrocartography lines are calculated — ASC, DSC, MC, IC explained

items.title: What Each Planet Line Means in Your Astrocartography Map
items.description: Each planet carries a distinct energy across your astrocartography map. Sun lines boost self-expression and recognition — ideal for visibility and leadership roles. Venus lines attract love, beauty, and financial flow — widely favored for romance and creative work. Jupiter lines expand opportunity and abundance — the most broadly recommended for relocation. Saturn lines build structure and discipline — intense but deeply rewarding for long-term career goals. Mars lines fuel drive and ambition. Mercury lines enhance communication and intellect. Moon lines deepen emotional bonds and a feeling of home. The most powerful locations are 'power spots' — where two or more planetary lines intersect, combining their energies in one place.

image.alt: Astrocartography planetary line meanings — Sun, Venus, Jupiter, Saturn, Moon lines

items.title: Using Astrocartography for Relocation, Travel, and Life Planning
items.description: Astrocartography gives you a personalized, planet-by-planet guide for location decisions. Professionals seeking career growth look for Jupiter MC or Sun MC lines — regions where visibility and expansion are amplified. Those prioritizing relationships explore Venus DSC lines, where partnership energy peaks. Creative professionals favor Neptune ASC lines for inspiration and flow. Even short trips can be intentionally planned: visit your Jupiter line for a high-stakes business meeting, or your Moon IC line for emotional restoration and healing. Our free astrocartography calculator generates your complete personal map instantly using Swiss Ephemeris — the same professional-grade calculation system that astrologers worldwide rely on.

image.alt: Astrocartography for relocation and travel planning

usage.name: usage
usage.title: How to Use Astrocartography Calculator
usage.description: Generate your professional astrocartography chart in 4 simple steps.

items.title: Enter Birth Information
items.description: Input your birth date, time (as precise as possible to the minute), and city. Without exact birth time, you'll still see planetary lines (Sun, Moon, Venus, etc.) but not angular lines (ASC, DSC, MC, IC). Our database includes cities worldwide with automatic timezone and historical daylight saving time handling.

items.title: Select Planetary Lines
items.description: Choose which planets to display: Sun (confidence, identity), Moon (emotions, security), Venus (love, aesthetics), Mars (action, competition), Jupiter (opportunities, growth), Saturn (discipline, career), plus Uranus, Neptune, and Pluto. The system renders astrocartography lines in real-time on the world map.

items.title: Explore Interactive Map & AI Insights
items.description: Click any planetary line or power spot (line intersection) for detailed AI interpretation. Learn how that planet affects your career, relationships, health, and creativity in that location, plus whether it suits long-term residence, short visits, work, or study. No query limits—explore as much as you need.

items.title: Export Professional Files
items.description: Download high-resolution PNG maps, PDF interpretation reports, or SVG vector files with one click. All files are watermark-free and support commercial use. Print for consultation meetings, share with friends, or use in team relocation decisions.

feature.name: feature

Power spots (line intersections) are highlighted—these energy convergence zones are key focus points in astrocartography for relocation decisions.

items.title: Swiss Ephemeris Calculation Engine
items.description: We use Swiss Ephemeris, supporting planetary calculations from 3000 BCE to 3000 CE. Maintained by the Zurich Observatory, this library uses the same precision standards that professional astrology software worldwide relies on. Whether analyzing historical figures or planning future relocations, your astrocartography map accuracy matches professional astrology software.

items.title: Multi-Language Global Coverage
items.description: Search cities in Chinese, English, Japanese, and more across locations worldwide with historical timezone data. The system automatically handles daylight saving time changes (like US DST rule shifts 1970-2007) and timezone boundary adjustments, ensuring accurate astrocartography charts regardless of birth country or era.

items.title: Smart Planetary Line Filtering
items.description: Display or hide specific planetary line combinations without limits. Show only Sun+Jupiter lines for career cities, only Venus+Moon lines for emotional security locations, or hide Saturn+Pluto lines to avoid high-challenge zones. Save favorite filter configurations to quickly compare different planetary combinations and find locations matching your current life stage goals.

items.title: Power Spots Energy Analysis
items.description: AI automatically identifies and highlights line intersections (power spots) where multiple planetary energies activate simultaneously. These crossings typically exert stronger influence than single lines. For example: Venus+Jupiter intersections may bring romantic opportunities and wealth growth, while Saturn+Pluto intersections suit deep transformation and career rebuilding.

items.title: History & Multi-Person Comparison
items.description: The system auto-saves your generation history, supporting simultaneous loading of multiple astrocartography charts for comparison. Compare your planetary line overlaps with a partner's, identify Jupiter line intersections among team members, or compare transit chart changes across years. For team relocations, family moves, or partner site selection, quickly overlay multiple people's distributions.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Astrocartography Calculator FAQ - Common Questions Answered
faq.description: Real answers to questions our users actually ask.

items.title: What is astrocartography?
items.description: Astrocartography is a locational astrology technique that projects your birth chart onto a world map to reveal how planetary energies vary by location. Developed by astrologer Jim Lewis in the 1970s, it draws planetary lines — places on Earth where each planet was rising (ASC), setting (DSC), at midheaven (MC), or at its lowest point (IC) at your exact birth moment. Living or traveling near these lines amplifies that planet's influence in your daily life, shaping your experiences in love, career, creativity, and personal growth.

items.title: What does each planet line mean in astrocartography?
items.description: Each line carries its planet's core energy: Sun lines enhance visibility and recognition, Moon lines deepen emotional comfort and home feelings, Venus lines attract love and beauty, Mars lines amplify drive and passion, Jupiter lines bring luck and expansion, Saturn lines build discipline and karmic lessons, Uranus lines spark freedom and change, Neptune lines heighten intuition and creativity, Pluto lines trigger deep transformation. Each planet also has four line types — ASC (rising), DSC (setting), MC (overhead), IC (underfoot) — expressing its energy in different life areas: identity, relationships, career, and inner world.

items.title: What is the best astrocartography line to live on?
items.description: There is no single universally 'best' line — the ideal line depends on your current life goals. Jupiter lines (especially Jupiter MC) are widely recommended as the most broadly positive for abundance and opportunity. Venus DSC or Moon IC lines suit those prioritizing love and emotional security at home. Sun MC lines benefit those seeking career recognition and public visibility. Even challenging lines like Saturn or Pluto can be powerful for intentional growth. Use our free astrocartography calculator to generate your personal map and see which lines pass through locations you're considering.

items.title: How is astrocartography different from a birth chart?
items.description: Your birth chart is fixed to your place of birth and shows your planetary positions at that single location. Astrocartography takes the same birth data and projects it across the entire globe, showing how those same planetary energies would express if you lived anywhere on Earth. Think of it as a 'birth chart for every place on Earth' — the planets are the same, but their angular positions and influence shift dramatically depending on where you are. Astrocartography adds a geographical dimension to traditional natal astrology.

items.title: Who invented astrocartography?
items.description: Astrocartography was developed and popularized by American astrologer Jim Lewis (1941–1995) in the 1970s. He coined the term 'Astro*Carto*Graphy', created the software to project birth charts onto world maps, and systematized the practice of reading location-based planetary lines. While earlier astrologers had explored related concepts in locational astrology, Jim Lewis created the modern framework that is used by astrologers worldwide today.

items.title: What if I don't know my exact birth time?
items.description: You can still use Astrocartography Calculator! Without exact time, we can't show your ASC/DSC/MC/IC lines, but you'll still see planetary lines (Sun, Moon, Venus, etc.) which reveal plenty about location compatibility. For best results, check your birth certificate or contact the hospital where you were born.

items.title: I felt terrible living on my Venus line. Is the map wrong?
items.description: Astrocartography shows potential energies, not guarantees. A Venus line might enhance relationships but could also amplify relationship challenges you need to work through. Context matters—your personal chart, life circumstances, and other planetary influences all play a role. Our AI interpretation can help you understand these nuances.

items.title: How accurate are the calculations?
items.description: We use Swiss Ephemeris calculations with professional-grade accuracy, precise to within 1 mile on Earth's surface. Our calculations account for time zones, daylight saving time, and historical calendar changes. This is the same precision professional astrologers rely on for consultations.

items.title: Should I move based solely on my astrocartography map?
items.description: No. Astrocartography is a powerful tool for understanding location energies, but it shouldn't be your only consideration. Factor in practical matters like career opportunities, cost of living, visa requirements, and personal connections. Use our maps as one input among many for making life decisions.

items.title: Can I use the generated maps commercially?
items.description: Yes. Your generated astrocartography charts and interpretation reports can be used for any purpose: personal planning, professional astrology consultations, teaching, publications, social sharing, etc., without licensing fees. Your birth data calculates locally with complete privacy protection.

items.title: What is your refund policy?
items.description: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for the 2-Week Access Pass ($9.9) if you've used the service fewer than 3 times. Monthly subscriptions can be cancelled anytime, with a 7-day refund guarantee for first-time subscribers. For detailed refund terms, eligibility, and how to request a refund, please visit our Refund Policy page.

items.title: Which cities does AI analyze? Why can't it analyze the city I asked about?
items.description: AI only analyzes specific cities that your planetary lines pass through (e.g., Lagos, Madrid, Beijing). This limitation is based on astrocartography principles—planetary line energy exists only on precise great circle paths. If you ask about a city not on your planetary lines, AI will honestly inform you and recommend cities actually activated in your chart. Analysis results are for reference only and do not constitute professional advice. For more flexible personalized analysis, we recommend consulting a professional astrologer.
